# QA Checklist — <Client Name>

Run before any deliverable leaves the building.

## ICP / Trust
- [ ] Every prospect matches the agreed ICP.
- [ ] No prospect on the client's exclusion list.
- [ ] No confidential data exposed.
- [ ] No public claim about this client without written approval.

## Evidence
- [ ] Every opportunity has a verifiable source link.
- [ ] No overclaim in framing or messaging.
- [ ] Sample message is usable by the client without edit.

## Operations
- [ ] Pipeline tracker updated.
- [ ] Revenue action log updated.
- [ ] Next action defined for every open item.
- [ ] Follow-up date set for every open proposal.
